title: Add Research System validation tooling
description: Follow-on to TASK-103 from Guidelines/MAP_repo_systems_gap_review.md: once the Research System docs/templates exist, add a focused validator and tests that check required research templates/metadata enough to prevent empty or malformed research artifacts from becoming project truth. Keep scope to tooling; do not edit TASK-103's RESEARCH_SYSTEM.md or template prose except through review feedback.
acceptance_criteria: Research validator checks the required Research System template/artifact structure defined by TASK-103 without owning the prose system specification
Focused tests cover passing and failing research artifact/template cases
MAP_System/scripts/run_tests.sh includes the focused validator/test and the relevant validation commands pass
